title: Migrate authentication from OAuth2/SAML to API keys
body:
This PR replaces OAuth 2.0 JWT bearer token and SAML SSO authentication with API key authentication via X-API-Key header for the Nexus Integration Hub.

## Changes
- Remove OAuth middleware and JWKS validation
- Remove SAML IdP federation endpoints
- Add APIKeyAuthMiddleware with SHA-256 hashed key lookup
- Update all integration tests for Acme Corp connector suite
- Add key rotation endpoint POST /admin/api-keys/rotate

## Migration plan
- Existing OAuth/SAML clients have 90-day grace period
- New enterprise connectors must use API keys only

Closes #138
author: priya-sharma

title: feat(auth): implement API key middleware replacing OAuth/SAML
body:
feat(auth): implement API key middleware replacing OAuth/SAML

- Add APIKeyAuthMiddleware class in app/middleware/auth.py
- Remove oauth_provider and saml_idp dependencies
- Update .env.example with API_KEY_SALT instead of OAUTH_* vars
- All 187 Acme Corp integration tests passing
author: priya-sharma

title: chore: remove OAuth JWKS and SAML metadata endpoints
body:
chore: remove OAuth JWKS and SAML metadata endpoints

Removes dead code from auth migration. API key auth is now the sole mechanism for Nexus Integration Hub.
author: james-okonkwo

title: Add API key rotation and SOC 2 audit logging
body:
Follow-up to #142. Adds:
- Automatic key rotation every 90 days
- SOC 2 compliant audit log entries for key creation/revocation
- Admin dashboard widget for enterprise key management
- Integration with Acme Corp SIEM pipeline
author: james-okonkwo

title: fix: rate limiting for API key admin endpoints
body:
fix: rate limiting for API key admin endpoints

Apply sliding window rate limiter to /admin/api-keys/* endpoints.
Default: 10 requests/minute per admin user per Acme Corp tenant.
author: priya-sharma

title: Add Celery worker memory leak fix for SAP connector
body:
Fixes memory leak in Celery workers caused by unclosed DB connections in the SAP IDoc parser.
Bumps minimum deployment version to v2.4.0 for Acme Corp production cluster.
author: maria-gonzalez

title: feat: add OpenTelemetry tracing to integration engine
body:
feat: add OpenTelemetry tracing to integration engine

Instrument Celery tasks and Kafka consumers with OTel spans.
Export to Jaeger via OTLP for Acme Corp observability stack.
author: maria-gonzalez

title: Deprecate API v1 endpoints for enterprise connectors
body:
Adds Sunset header to all v1 endpoints. v1 will be removed on 2025-07-01.
All Acme Corp downstream systems must migrate to v2 canonical schema.
author: priya-sharma
